title: Marina Decoration Home Decor Ultra Soft Luxury Fluffy Goose Down Alternative Bedding Printed 3 Piece Comforter Set, Blue Chrysanthemum Floral Cream Base Pattern Queen/Full Size
features: Design and Feature: This Modern Flower Design have Cream Base with Blue Large Chrysanthemum, and Brown Branch and Leaves Decorated on It. Printed Matching Design on the Pillowcase. Marina Decoration Goose Down Alternative Home Textile Bedding Rich Printed Comforter Set. The Comforter is Oversized and Overfilled. Box-Stitching Design to Avoid any Shifting in the Comforter
Dimension: This Queen Full Size Included 1 Comforter 90 x 90 Inch and 2 Printed Pillow Shams 20 x 26 + 2 Inch

Material: 100% Polyester. The Comforter is Filled by 250 GSM Polyester. The Fabric is Made from 90 GSM Brushed Microfiber. Wrinkle Free, Ultra Soft, Breathable, Hypoallergenic and Deep Pocket. Be Comfortable All Year Round with Marina Decoration Comforter Set

This Comforter Bedding Set is a Perfect Gift Choice for Your Lover, Wife, Husband, Father, Mother, Neighbor, Family and Friends for Birthday, Christmas, Wedding, Anniversary, Housewarming, Valentine's Gift. You Can Use the Comforter Set at Home, Bedroom, Master Room, Guest Room, Kids Bed Room, Vacation Home, Cottage, Cabin, Lake House, Mountain House, Camping, Home Staging or Lodge Décor
Care Instruction: Machine Washable Cold. Launder Whites and Colors Separately. Use no Bleach on Colors. Tumble Dry Low
description: Marina Decoration Brand Marina Decoration Brand is Focus on Building a Comfortable Beautiful and Unique “Harbor” - Bedroom for Our Customer. Provide the Affordable Bedding Products for All the People. Make Sure Our Customer will Have a Comfortable, Health, Happy and Beautiful Sleeping Environment Size Available: Twin Single Size Included: 1 Printed Comforter 66 x 86 Inch, 1 Printed Pillow Sham 20 x 26 + 2 Inch Queen Full Size Included: 1 Printed Comforter 90 x 90 Inch, 2 Printed Pillow Shams 20 x 26 + 2 Inch King Size Included: 1 Printed Comforter 104 x 90 Inch, 2 Printed Pillow Shams 20 x 36 + 2 Inch All Season Comfort in Design Lightweight and Cozy. This Comforter Bedset Set is a Great All Year-Round Cover. It is Light Enough to be Used in Warmer Weather, but also Holds Its Own on a Chilly Night. It’s a Perfect Blanket Bedspreads to Keep Your Body Warm and Stress-Free in Winter. It is not Too Thick, and the Weight is not too Heavy to Keep You Comfortable and Keep You from Sweating Versatile and Gifts This Solid Elegant Decorative Comforters Sets can be Used in the Master Room, Bedroom, Guest Room, Kids Bed Room, Vacation Home, Cottage, Cabin, Lake House, Mountain House, Camping, Home Staging or Lodge Decor. Great Gift to Give to Father, Mother, Husband, Wife, Lover, Family Members or Seniors for Birthday, Mother’s Father’s Day, Christmas or Any Holiday
